info.english_meaning: to pray to honor to worship to respect
info.DAturUpanandinIwippaRI: ' pUjAyAM RO viBAzArce: arcayatyarcatercati  BUvAdO pAWasAmarTyAt kartugAmiPalercati ' (Slo.49) iti devaH  ayamAtmanepadIti SAkawAyanaH  ' aca ityeke ' iti ABaraRoktiH

upasargachandrika.example_text: 'arcata prArcata priyameDAso arcata' (f॰8.69.8) praSabdaH prakarze prArcata BUyaH pUjayatetyarTaH
'ima u tvA puruSAka prayajyo jaritAro aByarcantyarkEH' (f0 62110) aByarcanti pUjayanti aBirnArTentaraM karoti
'agne yatte'rcistena tampratyarca yo'smAn dvezwi' (aTarva0 2193) taM pratyarca taM dagDuM dIpyasvetyarTaH
